title: Create_A_Burger
description: A Modpack all about Create and playing together with your friends.
body:
# Create A Burger Presents:

Create A Burger is a modpack used by me and my Friends. A Minecraft modpack that centers around the create mod. Created by Von_To and his Friends, this Forge-based modpack is filled with content for you or you and a group of friends to explore. Wether you're looking to build intricate contraptions, explore automation, or simply add mechanical life to your world.

With Create, you can build anything from functional machinery to grand, moving structures like trains, windmills or even complex factories, all within the familiar Minecraft aestethic. Pair this with the countless addons available and you can create nearly anything.

# Main mods are:
Create

Create Steam N Rails

Create Copycats

A ton more Create Addons

Naturalist

And more....

A few performance mods
# 
*All mods are the property of their respective owners, massive thank you to them, without them all of this wouldn't be possible!
